videos.title: Table Tennis Grip - Shakehand and Penhold Explained
videos.description: How to hold the bat correctly with shakehand and penhold grips, finger placement, and grip pressure for beginners.

videos.title: How to Serve in Table Tennis - Backspin and Topspin Serves
videos.description: Basic serving technique covering backspin, topspin, and sidespin serves with legal serve rules and wrist snap mechanics.

videos.title: Pendulum Serve Tutorial - Sidespin and Deception
videos.description: Advanced pendulum serve with sidespin variations, ghost serve deception, and keeping serves short on the table.

videos.title: Forehand Topspin Loop Against Backspin - Step by Step
videos.description: How to generate heavy topspin on the forehand loop against backspin, including bat angle, brush contact, and leg drive.

videos.title: Forehand Loop Technique - Power vs Spin Loop
videos.description: Difference between power loop and spin loop, when to use each, and how to use legs and core rotation for maximum effect.

videos.title: Backhand Topspin and Flick Tutorial
videos.description: Building a strong backhand with topspin drive, backhand loop, and flick techniques using forearm and wrist action.

videos.title: Banana Flick Tutorial - Modern Receive Weapon
videos.description: How to execute the banana flick receive against short serves, wrist snap technique, and placement control.

videos.title: Push Technique - Keep the Ball Low and Short
videos.description: Forehand and backhand push technique, keeping pushes short and low, and adding backspin to prevent easy loops.

videos.title: Table Tennis Footwork - Side to Side and Pivot Drills
videos.description: Essential footwork patterns including shuffle step, in-out movement, Falkenberg pattern, and ready position fundamentals.

videos.title: Smash and Kill Shot - Finishing High Balls
videos.description: How to finish points with powerful smashes and angled kill shots against high balls, with timing and placement tips.

videos.title: Return of Serve - Reading Spin and Choosing Response
videos.description: How to watch the contact point on serves, read spin type and amount, and choose between push, flick, and loop returns.

videos.title: Match Tactics - How to Beat Different Playing Styles
videos.description: Tactical strategies against choppers, loopers, penhold players, and pips players. Serve-and-third-ball attack patterns.

videos.title: Table Tennis Mental Game - Handling Pressure and Focus
videos.description: Building mental toughness for table tennis, handling deuce pressure, pre-serve routines, and maintaining focus during matches.

videos.title: Table Tennis Equipment Guide - Blade and Rubber Selection
videos.description: How to choose the right blade and rubber for your level and playing style. Beginner vs advanced equipment explained.

videos.title: Rubber Care and Maintenance - Make Your Rubbers Last
videos.description: How to clean rubbers, apply protective film, store your bat, and know when rubbers need replacing.

videos.title: Playing Against Long Pips - How to Handle Spin Reversal
videos.description: Understanding how pips rubbers reverse spin, tactics against choppers and pips blockers, and adjusting your game.

videos.title: Fitness Training for Table Tennis Players
videos.description: Off-table fitness exercises including agility ladders, core rotation, wrist strengthening, and interval training for match stamina.

videos.title: Serve and Third Ball Attack Pattern - Win Points Fast
videos.description: How to set up third ball attacks with strategic serves, predicting the return, and attacking the weak response.
